author: sandypockets
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Display stock prices, changes, and sparkline charts in your notes with multi-stock lists and single stock charts.

manifest.author: sandypockets
manifest.description: Display stock prices, changes, and sparkline charts in your notes with multi-stock lists and single stock charts.
manifest.name: Stock Blocks

name: Stock Blocks

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Stock Blocks Plugin v1.5.0

### What changed

* Use generated release notes in release workflow by @sandypockets in https://github.com/sandypockets/stock-blocks/pull/31
* Add Yahoo crypto support for stock blocks by @sandypockets in https://github.com/sandypockets/stock-blocks/pull/32

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/sandypockets/stock-blocks/compare/1.4.13...1.5.0

### Checksums (SHA256)
```
main.js:      f786866bfdbe1ef6fe7cba2e2ce072754ecf9de77a29098d6d3b20c65609f0ee
manifest.json: 35f81bdbc20bc459c19cb8f5b124f75c0324e671724e369421786883c25c81fc
styles.css:   bc7137da181ca8dab245d480115fa3fe895d635d2bde77807e741dadaa63b5a0
```

### Verification
After downloading, verify file integrity:
```bash
sha256sum main.js manifest.json styles.css
```

This release is built by GitHub Actions and includes GitHub artifact attestations for the release assets.
